about_text: 🐉 Shadow of the Dragon Ecosystem Welcome to the ultimate Quantitative Crypto Oracle. Our platform bridges the gap between institutional risk management and cutting-edge artificial intelligence. 🧠 AI Analysis Powered by Gemini 3.1 Pro, the bot analyzes market structure, Fear & Greed indices, and live global news feeds to yield intelligent, context-aware directional biases. 👁️ The Watcher A 24/7 autonomous monitoring system that perpetually scans tier-1 cryptocurrencies, delivering high-confidence trigger signals. 🛡️ Personal Risk Management A dynamic ecosystem tailored to your portfolio. Customize your parameters to enforce calculated Stop Losses (ATR-derived) ensuring absolute capital preservation. 📈 Dragon Academy Built-in educational pillars designed to enhance your understanding of risk thresholds, reward ratios, and margin safety. 🌍 Professional Support Seamlessly process complex quantitative data structures across 7 natively supported languages.

welcome_message: 🐉 Dragon Crypto Oracle Welcome, {name}! I am your AI-powered crypto sentiment & risk management assistant. Use /help to see all available commands. Use /language to switch your interface language 🌐
help_text: 🐉 Dragon Crypto Oracle — Commands 🔮 Full Analysis /analyze <coin> [balance] [risk%] Example: /analyze BTC 10000 1 → Price · Structure · FnG · News · AI · Dynamic Risk. 📊 Market Data /price — Live BTC/USDT price from Binance /stats — Strategy performance statistics for the virtual ledger ⚖️ Risk Management (Manual) /risk <balance> <risk%> <entry> <stop_loss> Example: /risk 10000 1 65000 63500 → Position size · integer leverage · take profit (1:2 R:R). ⚙️ Settings & Profiles /set_balance <amount> — Update your trading capital /set_risk <percent> — Update your risk per trade /settings — View your current profile 🎓 Academy /guide — Educational module on risk concepts 🌐 Language /language — Switch interface language (EN · UA · ES · DE · RU · FR · PL) ℹ️ General /start — Welcome screen /help — This message
guide_text: 🎓 The Dragon Academy Welcome to the Dragon's lair of knowledge. Understanding risk is the key to survival. 🔹 Balance: Total capital allocated for trading. 🔹 Risk %: The maximum amount of capital you accept losing on a single trade if the Stop Loss is hit (Rule of thumb: 1-3%). 🔹 Margin & Leverage: Margin is the actual collateral used, while Leverage is the position size multiplier. High leverage does not mean higher risk if your position size and SL are calculated correctly! 🔹 SL (Stop Loss) & TP (Take Profit): Automatic closing points to protect your capital and secure your gains. 🔹 ATR: Average True Range. A volatility metric the bot uses to place safe, dynamic Stop Losses. 🔹 R:R (Risk to Reward): The ratio of potential loss to potential gain. The Dragon Oracle strictly enforces a minimum of 1:1.5 to ensure long-term profitability.
